modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: New employee needs admin access to DCOM clinic computers.

full_description_text: 
El nuevo empleado en DCOM necesita acceso administrativo. Los computadores de la clínica no permiten eso. Es importante para su trabajo, pero no sé cómo hacerlo.
short_description: New employee needs admin access to DCOM clinic computers.
description: El nuevo empleado en DCOM necesita acceso administrativo. Los computadores de la clínica no permiten eso. Es importante para su trabajo, pero no sé cómo hacerlo.
